name: ExtensionSubstanceProtein_NumberOfSubunits
title: R5: Number of linear sequences of amino acids linked through peptide bonds. The number of subunits constituting the SubstanceProtein shall be described. It is possible that the number of subunits can be variable (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SubstanceProtein.numberOfSubunits` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SubstanceProtein.numberOfSubunits` 0..1 `integer`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `SubstanceProtein.numberOfSubunits` 0..1 `integer`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SubstanceProtein.numberOfSubunits` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubstanceProtein` is not mapped.
Element `SubstanceProtein.numberOfSubunits` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
